title: Maximum Difficulty
description: A mod that increases the difficulty of Minecraft to its maximum, reaching 32-bit integer limits.
body:
This is the official mod from my video "_I Beat Minecraft on Maximum Difficulty_"

# Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AcWvPZdtmHU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# What it does

It sets Minecraft's global difficulty value to the **32-bit integer limit** which means literally everything in the game becomes _absurdly_ overpowered. Skeletons kill you in one-shot no matter how overpowered you are, zombies always wear armour, spiders always have potion effects and many other crazy quirks.

# Disclaimer

**Please, please, DO NOT USE THIS IS AN EXISTING WORLD. You know what will happen, and you'll be caught dead left right and centre, and you will especially regret it on a hardcore world.**
